failure.message: AssertionError: Expected key_prefix in log line: INFO:server:[checkout] user=84d41f2a-9613-4687-8507-0ca661f3d9ff plan=annual method=card api_base=https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe trial=True customer=cus_UmycSeAPDX3Eln assert ('key_prefix=sk_test_emer' in 'INFO:server:[checkout] user=84d41f2a-9613-4687-8507-0ca661f3d9ff plan=annual method=card api_base=https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe trial=True customer=cus_UmycSeAPDX3Eln' or 'key_prefix=sk_test_em' in 'INFO:server:[checkout] user=84d41f2a-9613-4687-8507-0ca661f3d9ff plan=annual method=card api_base=https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe trial=True customer=cus_UmycSeAPDX3Eln')
